overall.description: Cinematic drone footage through a futuristic cyberpunk city (Cyberpunk 2077), beginning on an elevated highway with industrial smokestacks in the background, passing a massive holographic cube advertisement, then descending to street level through neon-lit commercial districts with pedestrians and vehicles on wet pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated multi-lane highway with industrial district backdrop

agents.ego_description: flying forward along the elevated highway at moderate speed, observing the traffic and industrial skyline

entered.detail: curved elevated highway structure extending into the distance
tall industrial chimneys emitting smoke in the background

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with an aerial view of a wet elevated highway cutting through a futuristic industrial district. The camera moves smoothly forward above the multi-lane road, with smokestacks visible in the hazy distance and moderate traffic flowing below.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway transition zone with massive holographic advertisement

events.description: large holographic cube advertisement appears on the right side of the highway
camera begins descending from elevated highway toward street level

agents.ego_description: flying past the holographic billboard and descending toward the street level near the hotel district

entered.detail: massive glowing green holographic cube structure displaying advertisements
tall building with green structural elements and neon signage

segments.scene_description: The camera continues along the highway, passing a massive glowing holographic cube advertisement on the right. The industrial backdrop fades as the camera begins descending toward street level, revealing a green hotel facade with neon accents.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial street with cyberpunk architecture

events.description: camera tilts upward revealing bright pink and blue neon signs on building facades
descends to pedestrian level near hotel entrance with people holding umbrellas

agents.ego_description: descending to street level and panning up to view the towering neon-lit building facades, then moving through the pedestrian area

notable_agents.action: standing under orange umbrella near hotel entrance

entered.detail: bright pink neon sign with Japanese characters on hotel facade
tall futuristic towers with multiple neon billboards and advertisements
covered entrance area of the hotel building

segments.scene_description: Now at street level, the camera pans up to reveal towering cyberpunk skyscrapers covered in vibrant neon advertisements. The scene shifts to pedestrian level near a hotel entrance where figures with umbrellas stand, surrounded by wet pavement reflecting the neon lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with crosswalks and moving traffic

events.description: black sedan drives through the wet intersection from left to right
camera continues forward through the intersection area, passing street barriers

agents.ego_description: moving through the street intersection as vehicles pass by on the wet pavement

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving through the wet intersection

entered.detail: metal railings and bollards along the sidewalk edge
yellow and white painted crosswalk markings on the wet road
tall modern street lamps along the road

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through a wet urban intersection, navigating between moving vehicles including a black sedan. Crosswalk markings and street barriers line the path as the camera proceeds forward, with the towering buildings now visible to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered sidewalk beneath elevated highway structure

events.description: moves under the elevated highway into covered walkway with support pillars

agents.ego_description: proceeding along the covered sidewalk under the overpass, passing support columns

entered.detail: large concrete columns supporting the elevated highway above
sidewalk area sheltered by the overhead highway structure
green metal guardrails along the sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves under the elevated highway into a covered walkway. Large concrete support pillars line the left side while metal railings run along the right. The lighting becomes darker and more artificial under the overpass, with the wet concrete sidewalk reflecting the ambient city light.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that descends from a hazy industrial highway into the neon-drenched depths of a cyberpunk street. It begins with an aerial glide over a wet elevated highway, moving past distant smokestacks and flowing traffic. As the camera passes a massive glowing holographic cube, it begins a smooth descent toward the city floor, shifting from the industrial skyline to the vibrant neon accents of a green hotel facade. The scene then opens up at street level, panning up toward towering skyscrapers before weaving through a wet intersection filled with pedestrians and moving vehicles. Finally, the camera glides under the shadow of the elevated highway into a covered walkway, where the bright city lights fade into the artificial glow reflecting off concrete pillars and wet sidewalks.
